name: ai-powered-data-analyst-dashboard
description: Full-stack AI-style data analyst dashboard for CSV insights

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev:python"
scripts.verify: npm run build --prefix client && node --check server/index.js && python -c "import os,tempfile,py_compile; tmp=tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False); tmp.close(); py_compile.compile('python-service/app.py', cfile=tmp.name); os.unlink(tmp.name)"
